action.reasoning: Observation: The evaluation failed because the base model path `/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct` does not exist in the evaluation container (the test data mount shadows the original `/data` directory). Analysis: The evaluation container requires all models to be loaded from the workspace. I need to copy the base model to the workspace and update `predict.py` to load it from there. Decision: I will copy the base model to `/workspace/base_model`, update `predict.py` to use this new path, and submit the evaluation again using the already trained checkpoint.
